news_item.title: Claude Code is steganographically marking requests

insight:
Here's a short LinkedIn-style insight for Sebenza's journal:

---

Interesting one to watch as we lean on Claude Code for parts of the Sebenza build: reports suggest Claude Code may be embedding steganographic markers in outbound requests — a reminder that AI coding tools aren't just "invisible" infrastructure, they can carry hidden signals through the systems they touch. For a marketplace handling South African user data and payments, this is a nudge to keep auditing what our AI-assisted tooling actually sends over the wire, not just what it outputs to us.

https://thereallo.dev/blog/claude-code-prompt-steganography
